title: Subread
shortDescription: One place to read newsletters and subs.
longDescription: A unified reading platform for newsletters and subscriptions—built for faster discovery, better saves, and focused sessions.
description: A Unified Platform for Newsletter & Subscription Reading
result: Made reading sessions more consistent by reducing switching friction.

blocks.content: A modern reading experience for subscribers: faster discovery, better saves, and an interface designed around focus.

items: Problem: subscription reading was fragmented and hard to track
Approach: a unified layout + smart organization
Result: less friction, more consistent reading sessions

blocks.content: I led the design from concept to validation: aligning stakeholders, defining the workflow, iterating on information hierarchy, and validating with representative readers.
Add screenshots / annotated screens here (dashboard, reading view, save flow).

items: Challenge → Context → Decision: each section explains why we chose the approach
Information hierarchy that prioritizes what readers need in under 5 seconds
Micro-interactions that reinforce momentum (without visual noise)

blocks.content: Outcome & Impact: reduce time-to-start reading, improve save rates, and make subscriptions feel cohesive.
Learnings: what worked, what didn’t, and what I’d iterate next (e.g., personalization + tighter editorial controls).
